lyrics.line: Amazing grace how sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me
I once was lost but now am found
Was blind but now I see
Bless the Lord O my soul
O my soul worship His holy name
Sing like never before
O my soul
I worship Your holy name
Imela Imela
Okaka Onyekeruwa
Imela Imela
Eze m Onye oma
When I think upon Your goodness
And Your faithfulness each day
My very soul will bless You
And my lips shall sing Your praise
You are here moving in our midst
I worship You I worship You
You are here working in this place
I worship You I worship You
Way maker miracle worker promise keeper
Light in the darkness my God that is who You are
Your love is kind Your love is patient
You fill my heart with so much peace and joy
You're amazing You make my life feel brand new
Jesus You love me too much oh
Excess love oh
You are Great everything written about You is Great
You are Great
You are Great You are Great
Everything written about You is Great
